revision.comment: Bot: Create shrine page for Q136890171
Immanuelle moved page [[Q136890171]] to [[Unknown Shrine (Q136890171)]]
Text replacement - "WD=Q136890171" to "WD=Q136890171|1=Unknown Shrine (Q136890171)"
Text replacement - "is a shrine in the Engishiki Jinmyōchō." to "is a shrine in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]."
Text replacement - "| RONSHA ||" to "| {{ill|Shikinai Ronsha|WD=Q135022904}}[[Category:RONSHA]] ||"
Text replacement - "Category:RONSHA" to "Category:Shikinai Ronsha"
Bot: Generate standardized Shikinaisha page (upgraded script - full property sections, ILL links, P361 categorization)
Bot: Generate standardized Shikinaisha page (V8 - proper ILL deity links, P13677 URLs, province extraction)
revision.text:
<!--generated by generate_shikinaisha_pages_v9.py--> {{Infobox religious building | name = Unknown Shrine (Q136890171) | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Unknown Shrine (Q136890171) | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] }}
'''None''' is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]].
[[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages]]
{{wikidata link|Q136890171}}
